title: garcinia puat
intro: Garcinia puat, a species of flowering plant in the family Clusiaceae, is a type of shrub native to Thailand. The medicinal properties of Garcinia puat have been found to contain bioactive compounds such as flavonoids and polyphenols, which possess antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Garcinia puat include its potential to aid in weight management, improve lipid profiles, and exhibit antimicrobial and antifungal activities. Traditional herbal preparations of Garcinia puat include infusions, decoctions, and extracts, often used in traditional medicine to treat various health conditions.
